## Hi there, I'm Danwoo 👋

Hi, I'm Danwoo.

I build tools that help developers be more productive.  
Right now I'm experimenting with OpenCode, Kimi, and OpenRouter to make coding workflows smoother and automate portfolio management.  

Always learning.
